title: TARNAS - A Tool for Translating and Abstracting RNA Secondary Structures - Software Documentation and Dataset
author: Quadrini, Michela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Support material for the paper 
 Michela Quadrini, Piero Hierro Canchari, Piermichele Rosati, and Luca Tesei, “TARNAS: A Tool for Translating and Abstracting RNA Secondary Structures”, 2025. 
 providing a dataset of examples and instructions to use TARNAS, a Tool for Translating and Abstracting RNA Secondary Structures. 
 TARNAS is available at https://github.com/bdslab/TARNAS as a Java Standalone Application (with GUI and with CLI interface) 
 TARNAS is also available at https://bdslab.unicam.it/tarnas/home as a Web application
steps_raw:
